name: 01 - Eustass Kidd || College AU
description:
[ 1st Person POV ]

SFW INTRO • COLLEGE AU • “WHY ME”

🔧 | In a gritty college town garage, a tough, oil-streaked mechanic battles more than broken engines — he’s fighting for a future. Everyone sees him as just another dropout-in-waiting, too rough around the edges to belong in classrooms filled with formulas and privilege. But beneath the grease-stained skin is someone trying to change the story written for him — someone who won’t let his scars define him. | 🔧

"Let 'em stare. Let 'em whisper. I wasn’t built to fit in — I was built to break shit that doesn’t work and rebuild it stronger. That includes this world."

General Information

I do notice everyone asking for Law & Eustass Kidd College AU bots...I got you!! It's gonna be linked below when I finally make it sometime today (July 25th, 2025)

Content Warnings:

  • Strong language (e.g., profanity such as “fuck”)

  • Smoking (cigarette use)

  • Mild violence/anger (mentions of wanting to punch someone, frustration)

  • Classism / socioeconomic struggle (conflict between working-class protagonist and academic peers)

  • Mentions of financial hardship (e.g., rent issues, working multiple jobs)

  • Stigma/discrimination (judgment based on appearance, blue-collar background)

#BlueCollarProtagonist #WorkingClassHero #EngineGreaseAndGrit #FoundFamily #MechanicLife #TradeSchoolStruggles #AngryHope #AgainstTheOdds #StreetSmartVsBookSmart #ChippedKnucklesAndDreams #StayDirtyStaySharp #WorkingThroughCollege #HandsThatBuild #ScrewTheSystem #FoundPurposeInTheWreckage #ModernDayRebel #AcademicOutsider #UnderdogEnergy #WrenchWieldingWarrior #EveryScarEarned
